user.title: Connect to Verdantly (via RapidAPI)
user.description:
⚠️ FREE TIER LIMIT: Only **25 API calls per month**.

Agribud caches search results for 30 days and stores each plant's full data locally, so each unique plant search costs just 1 call and opening an already-added plant costs nothing. Still, plan your searches.

Steps to get your API key:
1. Visit {signup_url}
2. Sign up for RapidAPI (free) and subscribe to the Verdantly Gardening API (free Basic plan)
3. Copy your X-RapidAPI-Key from the dashboard and paste below.

Your key is NOT validated here (validation would burn 1 of your 25 monthly calls). The first plant search will surface any auth issues.

weather.title: Pick your weather entity
weather.description: Choose any HA entity that surfaces current weather. Agribud reads its state for rain/snow detection and its attributes for frost forecasting. Doesn't have to be a `weather.*` entity — a sensor or template entity works too.

error.invalid_auth: Verdantly rejected this key. Make sure you're subscribed to the Verdantly Gardening API on RapidAPI and copied the X-RapidAPI-Key exactly.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach RapidAPI (verdantly-gardening-api.p.rapidapi.com). Check your internet connection.
error.rate_limited: RapidAPI rate limit hit — you may be out of the 25-calls-per-month free tier quota. Wait for the monthly reset or upgrade your RapidAPI subscription.
error.api_error: Verdantly returned an error. Check your key and try again later.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — see HA logs (search 'agribud') for details.
